title: The Unshakable Money Trust Ritual
subtitle: A five-part ritual for consolidating trust in your ability to hold and grow money with calm confidence
excerpt: The Week 10 ritual from a 12-week money program. A ten-minute ceremony for solidifying settled trust in financial life: releasing remaining fear and instability, allowing deep unshakable trust, integrating calm through visualisation, and anchoring it in a written sentence. Use it at the end of the week when you want to consolidate the progress made.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Week 10 Ritual ('The Trust and Stability Ceremony') of The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom and Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use at the end of Week 10 of a money tapping program, or any time you want to mark a moment of financial consolidation: when trust has grown significantly and you want to settle it into the body.

content.text: The Week 10 ritual from a 12-week money program. Purpose: to solidify settled trust in your ability to hold and grow money with calm confidence. The five parts move from preparation through release, allow, integration, and an anchoring sentence written in your own handwriting.

Sit somewhere peaceful and quiet. Close your eyes. Picture yourself standing in a golden circle of light: steady, safe, unshakeable. Hold that image while you take one slow breath in and all the way out.
I am ready to release every last trace of fear, instability, or need for control around money. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow deep, unshakable trust in money, in life, and in myself. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.

Take a slow breath in, then all the way out, letting any remaining tension release with the exhale. Picture the golden circle expanding outward to surround your home, your finances, and the people you love — anchoring lifelong stability around everything you are building.
This week, I am grateful that trust and ease now define my relationship with money.
Write this sentence in your own handwriting. Feel it in your body as you write. Say it aloud once when you are done.
Adapted from the Week 10 Ritual of The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom and Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
